description: RBI Technology appears to operate brand-specific digital infrastructure for Restaurant Brands International restaurant brands such as Burger King, Popeyes, and Firehouse Subs. On the public developer-facing surface found here, it hosts MCP endpoints for those brands.
summary: rbictg.com exposes three public MCP servers: Firehouse Subs, Burger King, and Popeyes; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs were found.
